name: SUSHI Shot
short_description: Aim your sushi and shoot! Hit sushi of the same type to make them grow bigger and bigger!
detailed_description:
Combining two sushi of the same type will merge them into a new type of sushi!
Keep on matching your sushi so that they don't pile up and overflow onto the counter!
A new high score is always just within reach!

You can play with up to four players!

[Score Attack]

Earn your best scores possible to rank the highest among players worldwide!

[Battle]

Compete with up to 4 players and survive until the end while blocking each other out!

*Controllers are required for multiplayer play.

To receive news and update notifications
Please click on Developer: SAT-BOX at the top of the store page and Follow us!
